title: What do you need for a regression session?
subtitle: For an effective regression therapy session, it's important to ensure a comfortable environment and proper preparation.

time.title: Time
time.description: Set aside 2–3 hours for a full session. This allows you to take your time and deeply process your request.

headphones.title: Headphones
headphones.description: For online sessions, prepare comfortable headphones with a microphone for quality sound and communication.

place.title: Comfortable space
place.description: Find a quiet place where you won't be disturbed. Prepare a comfortable chair or bed for relaxation.

internet.title: Stable internet
internet.description: For online sessions, ensure a stable internet connection to avoid interruptions during the session.

list.r1: Avoid alcohol, caffeine, and heavy meals 2–3 hours before the session
list.r2: Wear comfortable clothing that doesn't restrict movement or breathing
list.r3: Formulate your question or topic beforehand that you want to explore
list.r4: Be open to the process and trust your inner experience
